reviews.text: We cannot say enough amazing things about Kiki Creates and Kara! She photographed both our engagement session and our wedding, and every single photo is absolutely stunning. Kara is professional, organized, and so easy to work with—she made us feel completely comfortable in front of the camera from day one. On our wedding day, she captured every special moment, big and small, so beautifully and naturally. Our photos truly tell the story of our day, and we will cherish them forever. If you’re considering Kiki Creates, do not hesitate—Kara is incredible!

We cannot recommend Kiki highly enough! From our very first conversation, she was incredibly thorough in her prep work, asking thoughtful questions about our vision, timeline, and the vibe we wanted to capture. She made us feel completely at ease throughout the entire process.
On the day of, Kiki was punctual, professional, and somehow managed to be everywhere at once without ever feeling intrusive. She blended in seamlessly with our guests, capturing candid moments we didn't even know were happening. Her warm and approachable energy put everyone at ease, which really came through in the photos.
What truly sets Kiki apart is her creative eye. She found angles, lighting, and moments we never would have thought of, and the final gallery was absolutely stunning. Every image felt intentional and beautiful. We've gotten so many compliments from friends and family who can't believe how incredible our photos turned out.
If you're looking for a wedding photographer who is talented, organized, personable, and delivers breathtaking work, book Kiki. You won't regret it!

Kiki is the best photographer! We’ve used her for every major life event from engagement to wedding to our honeymoon in Costa Rica! She has such a beautiful eye for design and the photos are truly unmatched by any other photographer. She’s incredibly kind and fun to be around and makes every event so comfortable. Everyone feels and looks beautiful in every photo! Highly recommended booking Kiki for your events!

Kiki is an exceptional photographer with a distinctive vision and genuine passion for her craft! She beautifully captured our wedding day, and we were so thrilled that we asked her to photograph our maternity shoot as well. She has a gift for personalizing each session while helping us feel completely natural and authentic.
My husband and I absolutely love every single photo she has taken!
Highly, highly recommended Kiki to capture any special moment

Everything about KiKi's work is beautiful. She's great to work with and was extremely patient with our families and guests during my wedding. We were hoping to beautiful photos that really caught the emotions of the moment and KiKi really did well in capturing everything we wanted and more. I would choose KiKi as our photographer over and over again. ❤️
